name: Systemd Service Reload or Start
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Jakob Weinzettl, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Systemd Service Reload or Start
SIGMA Description: Detects a reload or a start of a service.

False positives:
- Installation of legitimate service.
- Legitimate reconfiguration of service.

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%systemctl%' AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%daemon-reload%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%start%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Systemd Service Reload or Start on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%systemctl%' AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%daemon-reload%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%start%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Systemd Service Reload or Start
